mainText: A search for missing Flight MH370 concluded without locating the aircraft 12 years after its disappearance.
Israel conducted strikes on oil storage sites near Tehran, Iran.

titleText: JTF News: BBC News, Deutsche Welle
mainText: An explosion was reported outside the U.S. embassy in Oslo.

titleText: JTF News: PBS NewsHour, The Guardian
mainText: A bombing at a nightclub in Peru injured 33 people, including minors.

titleText: JTF News: PBS NewsHour, The Guardian
mainText: President Trump encouraged Latin American leaders to use military action to help the United States fight cartels.
